2604.13236.title: SemiFA: An Agentic Multi-Modal Framework for Autonomous Semiconductor Failure Analysis Report Generation
2604.13236.paper_summary: Semiconductor failure analysis (FA) requires engineers to examine inspection images, correlate equipment telemetry, consult historical defect records, and write structured reports, a process that can consume several hours of expert time per case. We present SemiFA, an agentic multi-modal framework that autonomously generates structured FA reports from semiconductor inspection images in under one minute. SemiFA decomposes FA into a four-agent LangGraph pipeline: a DefectDescriber that classifies and narrates defect morphology using DINOv2 and LLaVA-1.6, a RootCauseAnalyzer that fuses SECS/GEM equipment telemetry with historically similar defects retrieved from a Qdrant vector database, a SeverityClassifier that assigns severity and estimates yield impact, and a RecipeAdvisor that proposes corrective process adjustments. A fifth node assembles a PDF report. We introduce SemiFA-930, a dataset of 930 annotated semiconductor defect images paired with structured FA narratives across nine defect classes, drawn from procedural synthesis, WM-811K, and MixedWM38. Our DINOv2-based classifier achieves 92.1% accuracy on 140 validation images (macro F1 = 0.917), and the full pipeline produces complete FA reports in 48 seconds on an NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40 GB GPU. A GPT-4o judge ablation across four modality conditions demonstrates that multi-modal fusion improves root cause reasoning by +0.86 composite points (1-5 scale) over an image-only baseline, with equipment telemetry as the more load-bearing modality. To our knowledge, SemiFA is the first system to integrate SECS/GEM equipment telemetry into a vision-language model pipeline for autonomous FA report generation.
2604.13236.paper_summary_zh: 半導體失效分析（FA）要求工程師檢查檢驗影像，關聯設備遙測，查閱歷史缺陷記錄，並撰寫結構化報告，這一過程可能會消耗每個案例數小時的專家時間。<lb/>我們提出了SemiFA，一個自主生成結構化FA報告的多模態框架，能在不到一分鐘的時間內從半導體檢驗影像中生成報告。<lb/>SemiFA將FA分解為四個代理的LangGraph管道：一個DefectDescriber使用DINOv2和LLaVA-1.6來分類和敘述缺陷形態，一個RootCauseAnalyzer將SECS/GEM設備遙測與從Qdrant向量數據庫檢索到的歷史相似缺陷融合，一個SeverityClassifier分配嚴重性並估算產量影響，還有一個RecipeAdvisor提出修正的過程調整。<lb/>第五個節點組裝PDF報告。<lb/>我們介紹了SemiFA-930，一個包含930個註解的半導體缺陷影像資料集，這些影像與九個缺陷類別的結構化FA敘述配對，來源於程序合成、WM-811K和MixedWM38。<lb/>我們基於DINOv2的分類器在140個驗證影像上達到92.1%的準確率（宏觀F1 = 0.917），而整個管道在NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40 GB GPU上能在48秒內生成完整的FA報告。<lb/>一個GPT-4o的評審在四種模態條件下的消融實驗顯示，多模態融合使根本原因推理在1-5的評分標準上提高了+0.86的綜合分數，設備遙測作為更具承載能力的模態。<lb/>據我們所知，SemiFA是第一個將SECS/GEM設備遙測整合進視覺-語言模型管道以實現自主FA報告生成的系統。
2604.13236.author: Shivam Chand Kaushik et.al.
